an4.1:1.0.2: "Catunnaṁ, bhikkhave, dhammānaṁ ananubodhā appaṭivedhā evamidaṁ dīghamaddhānaṁ sandhāvitaṁ saṁsaritaṁ mamañceva tumhākañca. Katamesaṁ catunnaṁ.
an4.1:1.0.3: Idamavoca bhagavā. Idaṁ vatvāna sugato athāparaṁ etadavoca satthā:
an4.1:1.0.4: "Sīlaṁ samādhi paññā ca,vimutti ca anuttarā;Anubuddhā ime dhammā,gotamena yasassinā.
an4.1:1.0.5: Iti buddho abhiññāya,dhammamakkhāsi bhikkhunaṁ;Dukkhassantakaro satthā,cakkhumā parinibbuto"ti.
